samples:
I hope you're well, I hope you'll laugh soon
I hope your heart is open to the ones who will love you and take care of you now
We all will


And if the light turns cold, remember me
If the end comes down before we'd like it to
Remember that my soul is bound in mercy
I must wait until you are ready for this


So smile while you can and breathe while you may
Cry when you will but don't let it get away
The end comes down when heaven's ready for this


I hope you're well, I hope you'll laugh soon
I hope your heart is open to the ones who will come home to save you
It's time to


And if the light turns cold, remember me
If the end comes down before we'd like it to
Remember that my soul is bound in mercy
I must wait until you are ready for this


Smile while you can and breathe while you may
Cry when you will but don't let it get away
The end comes down when heaven's ready for this

I didn't wanna go to this
But somebody had to say something, did they?


Said I wanted no part of it
Didn't want nothing to do with it either
Somebody had to say something


Something had to change so we could breathe again
Something had to give before we breathed again
You and I both knew that you were gonna hurt me


What have I done now? Why don't you point the finger at someone else?
Why can't you see what you are turning into? You have changed
This love that was never ending just by taking your stand on a side
The only way out is through, the end has come



It's time for us both to face the music
To take responsibility for our lives


And though I would like to bury my head in the sand
Someone here needed to speak up without hesitation or bias


We need to clear things up so we can move on
Say something new so we can start things over again
If we're both honest, then maybe there might be a way out


It's time for us both to face the music
To take responsibility for our lives

What you think of me?
You're a piece of shit


"I am the center, everything revolves around me and I should be worshipped like a god."




If I could take a vote right now, then I would flush your sorry ass away. You don't have any fucking clue what you are talking about. Just because something happens to go along with your opinion doesn't make it a fact. Your arrogance is a symptom of the disease that has taken over your life.
"Well aren't you just a little bit of a dick?"

Trust in science. Trust in medicine. They are our only hope. Everything else is an illusion. We may as well keep pushing forward until we reach the other side.


You are an idiot. It's time for someone to put your head through some glass. Now buzz off!


No one likes you. Fuck you and fuck your cancer. You suck. You suck. Fuck yourself and die. I can see your light fading so soon. This too shall pass. Trust in science. Trust in medicine. Don't let them down.

Here we are
In the back of the line again


As you've moved away from me
I have tried to keep a distance
But I am coming in for me
I am closing out all that is past me




It hurts when you say it, don't you know?
When you look at me and tell me so
Like you mean what you're saying, like you really want me gone
Well, maybe not, but it feels just the same


A million reasons why you'd better stay
And one is how I feel when you begin to fade away


Feels good when you're holding me
I don't want to see you go
We both know it must be done
There's nothing else that seems to hold me


You'll hurt when you say it, won't you know?
You'll look at me and tell me so
Like you mean what you're saying, like you really want me gone
Maybe not, but it still feels the same
Feels just as bad as being alone


No matter where or when I'm trying to start over
What comes through loud and clear is your voice from another place and time
"Why can't we just let this thing die?"
The words cut deep, "Fade away, fade away
 Fade away, fade away now"

You think you're high and mighty
Don't you wanna get to heaven?
And I know what it takes to pass that muster


We are dust
We are bones
Satan is my middle name




High and mighty, don't wanna get to heaven
I know what it takes to pass the muster
Pass this test between the chosen few
Who stand above suspicion

This has become a game for those of us who choose to play
This has become an endless stream we cannot all not stay
Standing on our knees and reaching out before us
Reaching up to touch the sky
Lies as natural as breathing
It becomes a part of me
So give it up so we can leave behind the ugly history


Imposters crucified by their own jealousies
By them, but not by me
The only way back home


This is just a story told through bloodshot eyes, yet still
As a child must see his father, there seems nothing left to do but pray

Give it up now so we can move away from the ugliness
Shrouding every step in light to guide us
Now we'll dance like one again, sway and whisper, "I will take your hand
In my light, lead you where we've never been"
My father told me stories and they saved my life
Now he tells me secrets and these save me
Heal me, cleanse me
Hold me close while I come down
Help me slip away from reason
I need to feel alive

What are you trying to say
"You're an asshole, aren't you?"
I think I know what you mean
Just the same as you


Don't talk like you own me
Talkin' to me like you don't speak English
Like we all might not make it out of here alive


Well now then, fuck you right up
Fuck your soul and heaven too
How about a double-feature?
The one and only piece of advice that I can give you, my friend:

Go fuck yourself
Go fuck yourself
Go fuck yourself
Fuck yourself






You are an asshole, aren't you?
Why don't you just go die already
Die or something, damn it




We are both in danger here
But you still want to start a fight
You must have some kind of complex
That gets you so excited


Yeah, let's get together
Let's go through this thing called "anger management training"
If I may borrow the term from those other fucking fascist pieces of shit

Satan's Angel
I am the end and reason, one with the chosen few
The chosen, few


We have come to claim what is rightfully ours
And liberate our own kind from this alien overlord
Who would enslave us all?
It's time he went home
He won't like it, but that don't mean we can't take him out

This divine right no longer seems so strange or novel
So common, now
That none shall pass judgment on you when you are done
This only makes sense in a world of madness
In which I have chosen to remain
Impatient patience has become my virtue and my desire
So I must stay the course until victory is mine


Satan’s angel
I am the end and reason, one with the chosen few
The chosen few


Divine intervention may seem blasphemous and radical
But just think how boring heaven would be without Satan here


Angels who followed me will follow through by now
They had to leave before we began the journey
They understood that there was nothing left for them to do here
If they stayed, they would weaken as surely as I will if I stay

I hear a voice inside me whispering "All hail"
Why then? Because I know that these angels
Will follow me where no man has gone before


Here we go again
Heaven sure could use some company




No quarter given
One quarter question
No compromise
Give no quarter
Take what's mine
Enough said



What have we here? We see an angel standing naked before us
One wing missing, one eye bleeding
A halo hangs over his head, halos do not lie


Satan's angel
I am the end and reason, one with the chosen few
Chosen few

This is a story that I've heard before
It always reminds me of something you said to me, oh


I remember when it was October
There were leaves all around and the wind chugged like this
As we watched our shadows fall across the wall again, oh
You told me that the end was near
That there wasn't a hope in you
And then you laughed at me as tears came through


Oh, but what if your heart beats just a little bit faster?
What if your blood pressure rises up a little higher?
What if your breathing quickens just a fraction more?
What if your skin begins to burn within your center?
Well, that would mean that the End has come for sure
And none have been prepared to meet it
I can only imagine how it must hurt
But why don't you speak instead of giving hints so blatant?


My friend here he told me something one time
He told me a parable that happened long ago
Of a time where every man wore nothing but a smile
They went fishing without their hooks, they had no fear or care
Just lived, laughed and loved with not a worry in the world
One day everything changed because two men died
Their death cries rang out over the water in sorrow
Pointing towards Armageddon as we wept with them
Soon after we saw change start to take place
The fish disappeared, the sun grew cold and gray
The rivers dried up, the ocean rose
Then life itself seemed almost drained away

But on second thought, why even think about it?
No one speaks of things that may not happen
So put down this burden now and move into the light
For there is much to do today
We have eternity to play

We are all lost
This is a test


No one can save us, no one will understand
You must survive and move on, to become a man
It's time for change, it's time to heal, it's time to live in
A state of grace, it's time to learn the meaning of forgiveness
And then you'll rise up from your knees
As we all ascend into divinity




Life without challenge isn't growing any closer
Every day without struggle moves you further away from freedom
There's a wall that surrounds us like an endless ocean
That only those who swim beneath it could hope to see through





So take my hand, I can lead you through this test
Take my son, I can guide you home again
I know this ground better than you do or even I can
Trust me when I say what I say, trust me as I speak
The water has turned cold and so have our ways
But there's a way out if we just choose to forgive



My light shines through
Let go and let the light shine through me

My light shines through
Let go and let the light shine through me

My light shines through
Let go and let the light shine through me

There's a light behind you
Shining in your eyes


Why don't we all go home?
Why don't we all go home?
Don't you wanna lay down?
Why don't we all go home?
I said, why don't we all go home?


When the time has come to end this
We won't feel any pain


You can let your hair down now
Relax and take it easy
Let your guard down now
And make yourself easy to see
Easy to touch
Easy to heal




So why don't we all go home?
We should be together as one
Make our own way out of this
In our own image
What could possibly change that?
But fear holds us back


So I say we all go home
Go home where it's safe
Lay down our burdens
Where they belong
Where no one can see them
They belong to me, they belong to me, they belong to me


You can let your hair down now
Relax and take it easy
Let your guard down now
And make yourself easy to see
Easy to touch
Easy to heal
